engineering-practices.title: Engineering Practices
engineering-practices.description: Shared engineering conventions for Zimmer contributors (testing, git workflow, code style).

brand.title: Zimmer Brand & Philosophy
brand.description: What Zimmer is, who it's for (a single circle of trust — personal, couple, or partners — not teams or enterprise), and the opinions that follow: open source, standards-driven, human-in-control, handles the toil, secure downstream without enterprise auth. Read before writing anything user-facing.

brand-voice.title: Zimmer Brand Voice
brand-voice.description: How Zimmer sounds in writing (docs, README, UI copy, PRs): plain, direct, honest, specific. Includes the AI-slop tells to cut. Downstream of the brand reference; apply it to all prose.
